phonetic: ta蕣藞r蓲艐蓹; t蓹蕣藞r蓲艐蓹
phoneticUs: ta蕣藞r蓱藧艐蓹藢to蕣藞r蓱藧艐蓹
meaning: 闄跺叞鍔燵鏂拌タ鍏板寳宀涘寳宀告腐甯俔
examples: MV Rena is grounded 13.5 nautical miles off Tauranga. The reef can be seen to the right of the vessel.
In Tauranga I stayed with a family who were travel enthusiasts. They designed and built their own motor home and traveled in it for months at a time.
